import asyncio

lock = asyncio.Lock()
local_state = {}


async def update_shared_resource(key, value):
    async with lock:
        old_value = local_state.get(key, 0)
        local_state[key] = old_value + value
        new_value = local_state[key]

    await save_to_db(key, new_value)
    return new_value


async def transfer_funds(from_acc, to_acc, amount):
    async with lock:
        from_balance = local_state.get(from_acc, 0)
        to_balance = local_state.get(to_acc, 0)
        local_state[from_acc] = from_balance - amount
        local_state[to_acc] = to_balance + amount

    await persist_transfer(from_acc, to_acc, amount)
